member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Bus.MediatR.Behaviours.DomainEventsDispatcherBehaviour`2
member.summary: The deferred approach to raise and dispatch events Dispatch Domain Events collection in a unique atomic transaction. BEFORE committing data (EF SaveChanges) into the DB. This makes a single transaction including side effects from the domain event handlers that are using the same DbContext with Scope lifetime. Note: If an unhandled exception occurs, all the saved changes will be rolled back by the UnitOfWorkBehaviour. All the operations related to a domain event finish successfully or none of them do. See this link for more information.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Bus.MediatR.Behaviours.LoggerBehaviour`1
member.summary: Defined a request pre-processor for a handler.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Bus.MediatR.Behaviours.LoggerBehaviour`1.Process(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Process method executes before calling the Handle method on your handler.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService
member.summary: Cache service implementation using Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid. HybridCache provides a multi-layer caching strategy combining in-memory and distributed caching.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCache)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.GetAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a value from the cache asynchronously.
member.typeparam: The type of the cached value.
member.returns: A cache value wrapper indicating whether the value exists and its content.
member.exception: Thrown when cacheKey is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.SetAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sets a value in the cache asynchronously.
member.typeparam: The type of the value to cache.
member.param: The expiration time span. If null, no expiration is set.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when cacheKey is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.RemoveByPrefixAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes all cached entries that start with the specified prefix.
member.remarks: This implementation tracks keys internally by prefix and removes them individually. Note: Keys set outside of this service or through distributed cache mechanisms may not be tracked.
member.param: The prefix of cache keys to remove.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when prefix is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.ExtractPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the prefix from a cache key (everything before the last colon).
member.returns: The prefix of the cache key.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.CachedValueWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper class to distinguish between cached values and cache misses.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.CachedValueWrapper.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached value.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.CacheService.CachedValueWrapper.IsFromFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this value was created by the factory (cache miss).

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.HybridCacheValue`1
member.summary: Implementation of ICacheValue for HybridCache. Wraps the retrieved value and provides information about its existence.
member.typeparam: The type of the cached value.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.HybridCacheValue`1.#ctor(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Indicates whether the value was found in the cache.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.HybridCacheValue`1.HasValue
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a value exists in the cache.
member.remarks: Returns true only if the value was found in the cache. This correctly distinguishes between "not in cache" and "cached null/default value".
member.returns: true if a value exists in the cache; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cache.HybridCacheValue`1.IsNull
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the value is null or not found.
member.remarks: Returns true if either: - The value was not found in the cache, OR - The cached value itself is null/default.
member.returns: true if the value is null, default, or not found; otherwise, false.
